title: juniperus excelsa subsp. turcomanica
intro: Juniperus excelsa subsp. turcomanica, also known as Turkestan juniper, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree in the cypress family, native to Central Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Juniperus excelsa subsp. turcomanica include relief from urinary tract infections, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, essential oil, and tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
